content: FastAPI 0.138.1 async POST endpoint with asyncio bool flag lock: declare module-level _running=False, @app.post('/run') checks it, returns 409 if True, otherwise sets True, calls asyncio.create_task(work()), returns 200. Task resets _running=False in finally block. Fully async, no blocking. Use uvicorn 0.49.0 as ASGI server.
